note: Researched, source-cited DEFAULT values (see docs/region-research.md for the per-state sources, confidence and caveats). These are NOT a sanctioned plan and NOT legal advice. verify:true on every state — confirm against the live state DCR / municipal bye-laws for the SPECIFIC plot (KA: BBMP/GBA RMP-2015 + Nov-2025 amendment; TG: GHMC/HMDA Telangana Building Rules 2012 via TS-bPASS; AP: AP Building Rules 2017 G.O.Ms.119 + TUDA/TMC) before relying on a code result. Exact FAR/coverage/setbacks/height depend on the zone, plot dimensions, abutting road width and current notified tables.

KA.label: Karnataka
KA.note: Bengaluru — BBMP/GBA under RMP-2015 zoning (amended Nov-2025). Working defaults for a ~150-300 sqm plot on a road <12 m up to 11.5-12 m height. RMP-2015 fixes setbacks as % of site dimensions (front ~12%, rear/side ~8%) which yields ~1.5 m front / ~1.0 m rear+side on a small plot; the Nov-2025 amendment RELAXES these for plots <=150 sqm (0.9 front / 0.7 rear / 0.7 one side, second side may be nil). Two regimes are both in circulation — confirm the sanctioned table with BBMP/GBA. Sources + confidence in docs/region-research.md.

MH.label: Maharashtra
MH.note: Reference only — NOT a supported generation state (the generator serves KA/TG/AP). DCPR/UDCPR working defaults; verify against the current sanctioned DCPR table for the specific plot.

TG.label: Telangana
TG.note: Hyderabad — GHMC/HMDA under Telangana Building Rules 2012 (G.O. Ms. 168) via TS-bPASS. The rules govern buildability through setbacks + height, not a fixed FAR/coverage cap for individual houses; FAR 1.5 and coverage 55% are practitioner working defaults for a <12 m road. Setback bands: 101-200 sqm -> front 1.5 / side+rear 1.0; 201-300 sqm -> front 2.0 / side+rear 1.5; front increases with road width. Plots <~50 sqm (and self-certified up to 75 sq yd G+1) need effectively no setbacks. Max height ~10 m on a <9 m road, 15 m on 9-12 m. Sources + confidence in docs/region-research.md.

AP.label: Andhra Pradesh
AP.note: Tirupati (TMC/TUDA) under the statewide AP Building Rules 2017 (G.O. Ms. No. 119, dt. 28-03-2017, Table-17 setbacks / Table-5 room minimums), read directly from the official G.O. PDF. The rules express the buildable envelope through setback + permissible-height bands rather than a fixed FAR/coverage for small non-high-rise plots; FAR ~1.75 and coverage ~60% are derived practitioner estimates. Setbacks (100-300 sqm, road <12 m): front 1.5-2.0 m, sides/rear 0.5-2.0 m rising with height; a 1 m frontage green strip is mandatory; stilt parking floor is excluded from height. Max height ~10 m for G+2 without a 12 m road. Sources + confidence in docs/region-research.md.
